settings.heading: Sugar-Free
settings.tagline: All the flavor, none of the sugar.
settings.qv_note: Naturally sweetened with monk fruit & stevia for a clean, rounded sweetness with no aftertaste

settings.label: Sugar-free joke
settings.joke1: Why did the latte go sugar-free? It was done with the crash-and-burn relationships.
settings.joke2: My sweet tooth and my sugar-free syrup have finally made peace.
settings.joke3: What’s sweet, smooth, and has a rock-solid alibi? Zero-sugar syrup — no crash on record.
settings.joke4: I told my coffee I’m quitting sugar. It said, “You’re still my type — extra sweet, zero regret.”
settings.joke5: Sugar-free: because your 3 p.m. self deserves a flavor, not a faceplant.
settings.joke6: Why don’t sugar-free syrups spill secrets? They keep it sweet and never spill the sugar.
settings.joke7: My nutritionist looked at my coffee and said, “Finally, a sweet decision.”
settings.joke8: Sugar-free syrup: proof you can have your sweet and drink it too.
settings.joke9: What did the espresso say to the sugar-free vanilla? “You complete me — minus the crash.”
settings.joke10: I asked for sweet with zero regrets. The barista just handed me sugar-free.
settings.joke11: Sugar-free flavor walked in and the whole cup straightened up — no crash, no chaos.
settings.joke12: Diet starts Monday? Mine starts every cup — sugar-free, still delicious.
